name: Hawk Revolver
description: Ultimate Edition exclusive revolver with palm-tree grips and engraved finish. Jason's personal sidearm — part of a his-and-hers pair with the Little Morgan.
acquisition: GTA6 Ultimate Edition exclusive. Not obtainable in Standard Edition. Unlocked automatically when you start the game with Ultimate Edition.
tips: Keep both Hawk and Little Morgan — they share ammo upgrades and having both gives you dual-wield capability if the mechanic is available.

name: Little Morgan Revolver
description: Ultimate Edition exclusive revolver with palm-tree grips and engraved finish. Lucia's personal sidearm — part of a his-and-hers pair with the Hawk.
acquisition: GTA6 Ultimate Edition exclusive. Not obtainable in Standard Edition. Unlocked automatically when you start the game with Ultimate Edition.
tips: Pairs with the Hawk Revolver. Both are scoped and engraved — these are collector weapons first, practical sidearms second.

name: Girardi ES9 Custom Pistol
description: Jason's personalized custom pistol. Part of the Ultimate Edition exclusive weapon set with unique finish and performance tuning.
acquisition: GTA6 Ultimate Edition exclusive. Not obtainable in Standard Edition.
tips: Likely a high-capacity modern pistol — keep it as your primary sidearm early-game before better weapons unlock.

name: Klose K17 Custom Pistol
description: Lucia's personalized custom pistol. Part of the Ultimate Edition exclusive weapon set with unique finish and performance tuning.
acquisition: GTA6 Ultimate Edition exclusive. Not obtainable in Standard Edition.
tips: Compact and concealable — likely better for stealth/missed-detection scenarios than the Girardi ES9.
